46.reason: [This loop merges terms with same exponent but does not remove the merged terms from the array, leading to duplicate or zero-coefficient terms being printed later. Also, it doesn't update cnt3 to reflect merged terms, so the final print loop outputs invalid/merged entries.]

50.reason: [Because cnt3 was not reduced after merging like terms, this loop prints extra or zero-coefficient terms that should have been eliminated during merging.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Because cnt3 was not reduced after merging like terms, this loop prints extra or zero-coefficient terms that should have been eliminated during merging.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This prints all original cnt3 terms, including those that were merged and should have been skipped or removed. Zero-coefficient terms may also be printed, which violates the problem requirement to only output non-zero terms.]
